dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the situation has become far more dangerous than either of us anticipated.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Someone discovered what we've been doing with the {quest_focus}. {target_npc} is being pressured to condemn our actions, and a patrol has been organized to hunt down the {quest_focus}. Meanwhile, the {enemy_type} have sent their own search party {location_hint}. I need you to gather {quest_item} to create a distraction and buy us time to {quest_action}.
dialogueChunks.outro: Both sides are closing in. If we don't act now, the {quest_stakes} dies on the altar of someone else's fear.

dialogueChunks.intro: They came for the {quest_focus} last night, {player_name}. We barely got away.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The mob wasn't interested in explanations. {target_npc} tried to talk them down but got shouted into silence. We managed to relocate the {quest_focus} to a hiding spot {location_hint}, but we can't stay long. The {enemy_type} raids have intensified. I need {quest_item} to sustain the {quest_focus} while I try to {quest_action}.
dialogueChunks.outro: The {quest_threat} {quest_threat_is} closing in from every direction. We need supplies and we need them fast.

dialogueChunks.intro: The {enemy_type} sent an emissary, {player_name}. And our people nearly killed it on sight.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The emissary carried a message: they want the {quest_focus} returned, and they're willing to offer {quest_item} in exchange and stop raiding {location_hint}. But our guards intercepted the messenger. {target_npc} is caught between people who want war and an enemy offering something that looks like peace.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need someone to reach the {enemy_type} camp and confirm the offer is genuine before the {quest_threat} turns this into a massacre. If their offer is real, {quest_action} could end years of bloodshed.
